sequenceDiagram
    Alice->>Bob: Hello
    loop every minute
        Alice->>Bob: Ping
        Bob-->>Alice: Pong
    end
    Alice->>Bob: Bye
---
+-------+     +-----+
| Alice |     | Bob |
+---+---+     +--+--+
    |            |
    | Hello      |
    +----------->|
  +-[loop every minute]-+
  | |            |      |
  | | Ping       |      |
  | +----------->|      |
  | |            |      |
  | | Pong       |      |
  | |<...........+      |
  | |            |      |
  +---------------------+
    |            |
    | Bye        |
    +----------->|
    |            |
